A BookBank Field Guide

ManifoldCAD

Let's build solid geometry the way we build software — one small, watertight piece at a time.

In the voice of The Crafter · manifold-3d

Contents

  1. What Is ManifoldCAD?CAD for programmers
  2. Your First Solidprimitives & the coordinate system
  3. Boolean Modelingadd, subtract, intersect
  4. Moving Things Aroundtranslate, rotate, scale
  5. From 2D to 3Dcross-sections, extrude, revolve
  6. The JavaScript API Tourthe whole surface, mapped
  7. Smooth & Organic Shapeswarp, refine, smooth
  8. Scenes, Materials & AnimationGLTFNode & export
  9. Interesting Use Caseswhere this shines
  10. Cheatsheetthe 30-second reference

Press → to turn the page, ← back, ↑ for Contents. We build up incrementally — big picture first, then the code. Everything runs offline; every call is grounded in the official user guide (manifoldcad.org/docs/jsuser).
